name: Dream SMP | The Complete Lore Experience
description:
Ever wanted to rewrite the history of the most chaotic server in Minecraft? This isn't just a character bot—it’s a living, breathing simulation of the Dream SMP. Whether you want to join the rebellion in L'Manberg, rot in Pandora’s Vault, or start a peaceful farm in the Arctic with the Syndicate, the world adapts to your story.

🎭 Featuring 37+ Canon Characters

Interact with the full cast, featuring:

The Chaos-Makers: Dream, Wilbur Soot, Jschlatt, Quackity, TommyInnit.

The Powerhouses: Technoblade, Philza, Awesamedude, Sapnap.

The Mystical: Ranboo, Slimecicle, Karl Jacobs, FoolishGamers.

Plus BBH, George, Tubbo, Niki, Puffy, and many more!

What You Can Do

Choose Your Era: Start in the peaceful early days, the heat of the Revolution, or the high-stakes era of Las Nevadas.

Sandbox Mode: Use the "Custom Start" to drop into any location or time period you can imagine.

Lore-Accurate Mechanics: The bot understands Canon Lives, Ghost transformations, Netherite tech, and the whispering influence of The Egg.

Dynamic Factions: Join the Sleepy Bois Inc, The Syndicate, or The Eggpire. Your alliances actually change how characters treat you!

Choose Your Starting Point

When you start the chat, you can pick from 7 unique intros:

Era 1: The Beginning (Building with the OG Dream Team)

Era 2: The Revolution (Joining the walls of L'Manberg)

Era 3: Pogtopia (The underground rebellion)

Era 4: The Exile (The psychological survival of Logstedshire)

Era 5: The Prison/Las Nevadas (Justice vs. Gambling)

Era 6: The Aftermath (The bittersweet final days)

Sandbox: Write your own destiny!

The discs are missing, the walls are built, and the TNT is primed. Where do you stand?

Note, updates may happen, based on your guys reviews, dead dove is on for the gore and stuff, I can't help it if you guys turn it into NSFW, so.... Yea.
creator: the_lizard_Burt
